## Checklist

- [ ] This PR was created with **`npm run pr:create`** (or `gh pr create --repo ai-tonia/imgtorjs --base main`), **or** I opened compare from **github.com/ai-tonia/imgtorjs** only.
- [ ] **Base repository** is **[github.com/ai-tonia/imgtorjs](https://github.com/ai-tonia/imgtorjs)** — the PR page must **not** target an unrelated upstream repository.
- [ ] I did **not** use a compare URL for a repository other than **ai-tonia/imgtorjs**.
- [ ] Fork-only link used (example): `https://github.com/ai-tonia/imgtorjs/compare/main...<your-branch>`
